title: Discovering Character and Crafting Your Own Autobiography

questions.question: What does "infer" mean?
options: To figure something out based on clues, rather than being told directly.
Able to wait calmly without getting annoyed.
questions.correct_answer: To figure something out based on clues, rather than being told directly.
questions.explanation: "infer" means: To figure something out based on clues, rather than being told directly.

questions.question: Fill in the blank: You can infer a writer's personality from their ______ by analyzing their words and actions.
questions.explanation: The full sentence is: "You can infer a writer's personality from their autobiography by analyzing their words and actions."

questions.question: Which of the following is TRUE about this topic?
options: You can infer a writer's personality from their autobiography by analyzing their words and actions.
A good autobiography chapter includes facts, opinions, precise language, and a reflective comment.
Improve your writing by using more details and stronger, more precise verbs.
Always use quotations as evidence to support your opinions about a text.
questions.correct_answer: Always use quotations as evidence to support your opinions about a text.
questions.explanation: Correct! "Always use quotations as evidence to support your opinions about a text." is one of the key things to remember.
